_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Ki67 staining was reduced approximately 3.5-fold in Merlin-negative Mero-41 cells...In contrast, reduction in Ki-67 positivity in Merlin-positive MSTO-211H cells in response to FAK siRNA treatment was marginal
details: Reduced Ki67 staining approximately 3.5-fold in Merlin-negative Mero-41 cells, with marginal reduction in Merlin-positive MSTO-211H cells
